overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character navigating an industrial waterfront district. The clip progresses from a semi-covered building entrance with vending machines, through a container yard with workers, and along a scenic waterfront promenade revealing a distant city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial building entrance with vending machines

events.description: player turns right away from vending machines toward the open dock area
exits the semi-covered building area into the open container yard

agents.ego_description: turning away from the vending machines and walking through a crowd of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking through the plaza area

entered.detail: cluster of illuminated vending machines with red and white signage
dark metal wall of the industrial building with pipes and panels
stacked colorful shipping containers in green, blue, and red
large digital screen displaying anime-style characters

segments.scene_description: The player starts near a cluster of vending machines at an industrial building entrance. After turning right, they move through a moderate crowd of pedestrians in a semi-covered plaza area, transitioning toward an open dock with shipping containers visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open container yard with cargo handling equipment

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the container yard passing groups of workers

notable_agents.action: workers in safety gear standing and conversing near the containers

entered.detail: tall yellow cargo crane structure with horizontal beam
angled metal ramps with diamond plate texture for vehicle access
black and yellow striped safety bollards
large red cargo ship hull with white identification numbers

segments.scene_description: Moving through the wide-open container yard, the player passes metal ramps and safety bollards while workers stand conversing near the colorful shipping containers. A large red cargo ship hull becomes visible on the right as the player progresses along the dock.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront walkway between building and ship

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow waterfront path with industrial equipment on the left

entered.detail: tall industrial building facade with metal panels and pipes
large circular ventilation fans mounted on the building exterior
yellow painted metal staircase and platforms on building exterior
tall industrial smokestack emitting white smoke

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a narrow waterfront walkway flanked by an industrial building with large ventilation fans and yellow metal stairs on the left, and the red cargo ship hull on the right. The path continues straight with a distant smokestack visible against the clear sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with panoramic city views

agents.ego_description: walking along the open waterfront with expansive views of the distant city

notable_agents.action: solitary pedestrian walking ahead along the waterfront path

entered.detail: dense futuristic city skyline with numerous high-rise buildings across the water
hazy mountain range visible behind the city skyline
expansive body of water with gentle waves lapping at the concrete edge
red and white striped tower structure at the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The industrial structures give way to an open waterfront promenade with panoramic views of a distant futuristic city skyline across the water. Mountains rise behind the cityscape as the player continues walking along the concrete edge, passing a red and white coastal tower on the left and approaching a distant pedestrian ahead on the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped industrial entrance that gradually opens into a panoramic waterfront vista of a futuristic city. It begins near a cluster of vending machines at a building entrance, moving through a crowd of pedestrians in a semi-covered plaza before transitioning toward an open dock. As the camera enters the wide container yard, it passes metal ramps and workers gathered near colorful shipping containers, eventually drawing closer to the massive hull of a red cargo ship. The scene then narrows into a walkway flanked by industrial ventilation fans and yellow stairs, following the line of the ship toward a distant smokestack. Finally, the industrial structures give way to an open concrete promenade, revealing a sprawling city skyline and distant mountains across the water as the camera passes a red and white coastal tower.
